method: surface profilometry and curvature interpretation reported in the source paper
operating_conditions: Approximately 5 mm circular GaN/III-N membrane after CVD diamond growth; the membrane was warped, displaced toward the plasma, and damaged.
review_notes: Estimated maximum net bow from the paper; do not treat as raw metrology data.

uncertainty.basis: The paper describes the result as an estimated maximum net bow of around 58 um and does not provide a dedicated numeric uncertainty for this estimate.
